dimensions.label: Scope control
dimensions.reason: 112 non-evidence changed files is broad for one review; 448 AgentLoop evidence file(s) also present (560 total). Non-evidence review areas: AgentLoop 43, Source 34, Tests 22, Documentation 10, CI / Automation 2, Config / Package 1.

dimensions.label: Evidence freshness
dimensions.reason: Verification evidence matches current task timing.

strengths: Task contract has problem, outcome, acceptance criteria, verification commands, risk notes, and rollback notes.
warnings: Large non-evidence change set; consider splitting before review.
claims: This is a review-readiness score, not a code-quality score.
The score is deterministic and based only on local AgentLoopKit evidence.
